title: pyrethrum aucheri
intro: Pyrethrum aucheri is a flowering plant species in the daisy family, native to the Middle East and Central Asia, known for its medicinal and ornamental value. The plant contains pyrethrin, a natural insecticide that has been used to repel mosquitoes and other insects. The medicinal properties of Pyrethrum aucheri include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and ointments can be made from the plant, providing a range of health benefits including relief from fever, headache, and sore throats.
